Bug / Task Description: boruvka builds a spanning tree of the right shape (spans all nodes, n-1 edges) but its total_weight is too high — it is not a MINIMUM spanning tree. On some inputs it picks heavier edges than kruskal/prim for certain components, because some component fails to select the minimum-weight edge leaving it.
Commit Subject: fix(mst): track cheapest outgoing edge for both endpoint components in Boruvka
